_README._about: Copy this file to test-targets.json at the PROJECT ROOT (it is gitignored) and fill in real targets. The HITL harness reads ONLY this file for every account/URL/query it is allowed to touch. Mutating actions may use ONLY the dedicated mutation keys below — never search results or synthesized values. Delete this _README block in your real file, or leave it (the loader ignores unknown keys).
_README.profileUrls: string[] — full https://www.linkedin.com/in/<slug>/ URLs viewed via profile.getProfile (READ-ONLY).
_README.profileUsernames: string[] — bare vanity slugs (e.g. 'satyanadella') for profile.getProfileByUsername (READ-ONLY).
_README.conversationId: string (optional) — existing conversation id for messages.getMessages (READ-ONLY); empty -> that step is skipped.
_README.messageTarget: { profileUrl, body } — MUTATING messages.sendMessage target. Use a safe 1st-degree / open-profile test account YOU control, plus the exact message text. Only fires with --include-mutating + a typed 'yes'.
_README.connectionTarget: { profileUrl, note? } — MUTATING connections.sendConnectionRequest target + optional invite note (<=300 chars).
_README.acceptRequestProfileId: string (optional) — MUTATING connections.acceptConnectionRequest target (a pending INBOUND invite you arranged).
_README.withdrawTarget: { profileId?, profileUrl? } (optional) — MUTATING connections.withdrawConnectionRequest target (a pending OUTBOUND invite).
_README.likePostUrl: string — MUTATING feed.likePost permalink (a safe post, ideally your own).
_README.reactTarget: { postUrl, reaction? } (optional) — MUTATING feed.reactToPost target. reaction is one of like|celebrate|support|love|insightful|funny (defaults to 'like'); use a NON-'like' value to exercise the reactions-flyout path. Use a safe post, ideally your own.
_README.commentTarget: { postUrl, text } (optional) — MUTATING feed.commentOnPost target + exact comment body. Use a safe post, ideally your own.
_README.allowLogout: boolean (optional, default false) — extra guard so auth.logout (MUTATING) only runs when BOTH this AND --include-mutating are set.

messageTarget.body: Hi — this is an automated HITL test message, please ignore.

connectionTarget.note: Connecting for an automated HITL test — feel free to ignore.

commentTarget.text: Automated HITL test comment — please ignore.
